LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT DICKINSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO FILE A RESPONSE. EVEN IF SOME OF THE FRAUD THEORIES ARE NOT VIABLE, PLAINTIFF NEED ONLY PLEAD ONE CLAIM TO SURVIVE DEMURRER. AT PAR. 13 OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT CALLED THE POLICE ON MARCH 7, 2012, AND FALSELY CONVINCED THE POLICE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DELUSIONAL/SUICIDAL AND NEEDED TO BE COMMITTED. SUCH ALLEGATIONS SUPPORT A FRAUD CLAIM UNDER RANDI W. V. MUROC JOINT UNIFIED SCHOOL DIST. (1997) 14 CAL.4TH 1066, 1075 ("[A]N ACTOR WHO MAKES A MISREPRESENTATION IS SUBJECT TO LIABILITY TO ANOTHER FOR PHYSICAL HARM WHICH RESULTS FROM AN ACT DONE BY THE OTHER OR A THIRD PERSON IN RELIANCE UPON THE TRUTH OF THE REPRESENTATION, IF THE ACTOR [] (A) INTENDS HIS STATEMENT TO INDUCE OR SHOULD REALIZE THAT IT IS LIKELY TO INDUCE ACTION BY THE OTHER, OR A THIRD PERSON, WHICH INVOLVES AN UNREASONABLE RISK OF PHYSICAL HARM TO THE OTHER, AND [] (B) KNOWS [] (I) THAT THE STATEMENT IS FALSE, OR [] (II) THAT HE HAS NOT THE KNOWLEDGE WHICH HE PROFESSES."). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489; DEPT. 302. =302/EHG

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JESSICA L. CHYLIK, TEL. NO. 1-415-938-6552 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DAVID M. HELBRAUN OF THE HELBRAUN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-982-4000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT DICKINSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled with 20 days leave to file a response. Even if some of the fraud theories are not viable, plaintiff need only plead one claim to survive demurrer. At par. 13 of the amended complaint, plaintiff alleges that defendant called the police on March 7, 2012, and falsely convinced the police that plaintiff was delusional/suicidal and needed to be committed. Such allegations support a fraud claim under Randi W. v. Muroc Joint Unified School Dist. (1997) 14 Cal.4th 1066, 1075 ("[a]n actor who makes a misrepresentation is subject to liability to another for physical harm which results from an act done by the other or a third person in reliance upon the truth of the representation, if the actor [] (a) intends his statement to induce or should realize that it is likely to induce action by the other, or a third person, which involves an unreasonable risk of physical harm to the other, and [] (b) knows [] (i) that the statement is false, or [] (ii) that he has not the knowledge which he professes."). Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Dec-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROBERT DICKINSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off Calendar. Plaintiff has filed an Amended Complaint. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
